name: opencode-productivity-suite
notes: PowerShell-based development productivity suite targeting opencode. NOT a token optimizer in any meaningful sense: no compression hooks, no plugin API usage, no request interception. Contains: framework detection scripts (38+ frameworks via PS1 automation), slash commands (/analyze-codebase, /suggest-patterns, /backend-expert, /tailwind-hacker), CLAUDE.md-style prompt templates per framework, a team dashboard with 'Zero Defect' gamification metrics, and CI/CD config templates. Token reduction claims (60-80%) appear in a static metrics table in README with no benchmark data or mechanism. No opencode plugin code found. Windows-first (PowerShell), no Unix-native install path. Not relevant as a token optimizer.
